name: Easier Than Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the baking powder with flour.
2. Add sugar and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients.
3. Mix well until combined.
4. Press the mixture into a 9-inch spring form pan.
5. Preheat oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Spread raspberry jam evenly over the crust.
7. In another bowl, beat cream cheese with sugar, egg, and vanilla extract until smooth.
8. Pour the cream cheese mixture evenly over the jam.
9. Toss apples with sugar and cinnamon in a separate bowl.
10. Arrange the apple slices in an overlapping pinwheel pattern on top of the cream cheese layer.
11. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
12. Reduce temperature to 400 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for an additional 25 minutes, or until sides are cool.
This is best served at room temperature.
